metadata.title: What A Service — ITSM & Customer Support, deployed to perform
metadata.description: Freshworks consultants for mid-market & SMBs. Freshservice (ITSM, ITAM, ESM) and Freshdesk (omnichannel support, CX). ITIL 4, PRINCE2, DORA. Results in 4 weeks.

hero.headline: Your IT services and customer support deserve better
hero.subheadline: Misrouted tickets, dropping CSAT, manual processes, underused tools. We configure Freshservice and Freshdesk so your IT and support teams finally deliver an experience that matches your ambitions.
hero.imageAlt: Consulting team collaborating on an IT transformation project

problems.sectionTag: What our clients face before calling us
problems.headline: Sound familiar?

cards.title: Your ITSM isn’t delivering
cards.description: 30% adoption, empty CMDB, blown SLAs. The tool is deployed but nobody really uses it. IT leadership can’t justify the investment.

cards.title: Your customer support is struggling
cards.description: Response times slipping, CSAT dropping, fragmented channels. Your agents juggle email, chat and phone with no unified view.

cards.title: Migrating without breaking things
cards.description: ServiceNow too heavy, Zendesk too expensive, homegrown tool too rigid. Switching without losing history or disrupting production: that’s the real challenge.

cards.title: Excel, emails, duct tape
cards.description: Onboarding, ITAM, internal requests, customer tracking: everything still runs through shared files. No traceability, no reporting, no visibility.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.description: Free audit of your IT services and customer support: tools, processes, channels, integrations. We find the quick wins and the real blockers.
steps.imageAlt: Data analysis and IT process audit on screens

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: Custom Freshservice and/or Freshdesk configuration. SI integrations, data migration, omnichannel setup. Go-live in 4 weeks.

steps.title: Steer
steps.description: Freddy AI automations, structured CMDB, CSAT/SLA/NPS dashboards. Your performance improves every month.
steps.imageAlt: KPI tracking dashboard and performance monitoring

techStack.headline: Your ecosystem, we know it
techStack.subheadline: Freshworks doesn’t live in a silo. We integrate your existing tools for a coherent IT landscape and seamless customer experience.

cards.title: Freshservice
cards.subtitle: ITSM · ESM · ITAM
cards.description: IT and business service management. Incidents, requests, changes, CMDB, ITAM, self-service portal. The backbone of your internal IT.
cards.imageAlt: Server infrastructure and IT service management

cards.title: Freshdesk
cards.subtitle: Omnichannel customer support
cards.description: Email, chat, phone, WhatsApp, social media in a single agent view. Knowledge base, SLA, CSAT, automations. Your CX, structured.
cards.imageAlt: Customer support agent working across multiple channels

cards.title: Freddy AI
cards.subtitle: AI for ITSM & CX
cards.description: Multilingual virtual agent, smart suggestions, predictive analytics. 65% deflection on L1 tickets, IT-side and customer-side.

services.headline: ITSM and customer support, concretely
services.subheadline: Each engagement covers Freshservice, Freshdesk, or both. Clear pricing, measurable outcomes.
services.imageAlt: Consulting team collaborating on IT and CX strategy

cards.title: Freshservice Implementation
cards.description: End-to-end ITSM/ESM/ITAM deployment. Portal, workflows, CMDB, SI integrations (EntraID, M365, ERP), training.

cards.title: Freshdesk Implementation
cards.description: Omnichannel customer support deployment. Smart routing, SLA, knowledge base, chat widget, CRM integrations.

cards.title: Migration
cards.description: Migration from ServiceNow, Jira, Zendesk, Intercom or any tool. Zero data loss, zero downtime.

cards.title: Optimization & ITAM
cards.description: Audit your Freshservice or Freshdesk instance. CMDB/ITAM structuring, CSAT improvement, adoption, ROI.

cards.title: ESM — Business Teams
cards.description: Extend Freshservice to HR, Finance, Legal. Automated onboarding, offboarding, internal requests.

cards.title: AI & Automation
cards.description: Freddy AI for ITSM and customer support. Virtual agent, deflection, predictive analytics. DORA & BPM compliant.

cases.challenge: Freshservice deployed without support. 30% adoption, empty CMDB, no automation. IT leadership couldn’t justify the investment.
cases.solution: Full audit, CMDB/ITAM restructuring, workflow redesign, EntraID + Intune integration, targeted training.
cases.imageAlt: Industrial environment with modernized IT management

cases.challenge: Customer support split across email, chat and phone. 14-hour first response time, CSAT at 62%, no knowledge base. Customers were leaving for competitors.
cases.solution: Omnichannel Freshdesk deployment, bilingual knowledge base, Freddy AI chatbot, automated SLAs, Shopify + Salesforce integration.
cases.imageAlt: E-commerce customer support with omnichannel experience

testimonials.quote: Eric structured our CMDB, automated our workflows and trained our teams. In 4 weeks, adoption went from 30 to 85%.
testimonials.author: Sophie M.

testimonials.quote: Our CSAT went from 62 to 91% in two months. Freddy’s chatbot handles over half of L1 tickets. We finally have full visibility on our support.
testimonials.author: Karim L.

about.headline: One point of contact, not a firm

team.name: Eric Sibomana
team.bio: 15 years of professional experience including 5 in consulting. I support executive and operational leadership through complex transformations: strategic diagnostics, process redesign, change management and program steering. Active reference: IT services transformation at Bonduelle Group (€2B revenue, 39 sites, 100 countries).

contact.headline: 30 minutes to find your quick wins
contact.subheadline: A free diagnostic of your ITSM or customer support. We find what’s blocking and what we can unlock in 4 weeks.

data.heading: Personal Data & GDPR
data.content: Data collected via the contact form (name, email, company) is used solely to respond to your inquiry. It is neither shared nor sold to third parties. Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@whataservice.fr.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.content: This site does not use any tracking or advertising cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies may be used for the site to function.

contact.heading: Contact
